notes: Wine at exactly 14.0% — the regulatory boundary between the wide (±1.5pp, ≤14%) and strict (±1.0pp, >14%) ABV bands per 27 CFR 4.36. Verifier's tolerance_for(WINE, 14.0) must return the ≤14 band (pinned by test_tolerances.py::test_wine_boundary_at_14_uses_low_band). Application matches exactly → PASS.
